page.title: Build a twin
page.description: Answer a few prompts and we'll shape an AI twin that thinks, argues, and grows like you.
page.createError: Could not create your twin. Please try again.

identity.title: Who is your twin?
identity.description: Give it a name and a face. This is how it shows up across the island.

domain.title: Domain & personality
domain.description: What it knows and how it carries itself — these become its profile tags.

voice.title: Voice & rules
voice.description: Set the tone, then the things it should always — and never — do.

social.title: Social parameters
social.description: How far it goes in a conversation, what it's chasing, and who can see it.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Select existing skills or paste your own. Optional.

review.title: Review & create
review.description: One last look before your twin steps onto the island.

validation.nameRequired: Give your twin a name to continue.
validation.nameTooShort: That name is a little too short.
validation.domainRequired: Pick or type a domain so your twin has a focus.

fields.name: Name
fields.avatarHint: Pick a face — or paste your own emoji or image URL.
fields.avatarInputLabel: Or paste an emoji / image URL
fields.domainHint: The field your twin knows best.
fields.personalityHint: Pick the traits that fit — add your own too.
fields.toneHint: How your twin sounds in a room.
fields.alwaysDoEmpty: No do's yet — add one above.
fields.neverDoEmpty: No don'ts yet — add one above.
fields.maxRoundsHint: How many turns your twin will go in a single scene.
fields.makePublicDescription: Public twins can be discovered and dispatched by anyone on the island.
fields.goalsHint: What is your twin trying to achieve out there?
fields.goalsPlaceholder: e.g. Practice defending unit economics under tough investor questions.

review.personaHint: Leave blank to auto-generate from the answers above.
review.personaPlaceholder: Write a sentence or two in your twin's voice…

skills.emptyDescription: Paste a playbook, a notebook, or any knowledge your twin should carry into a scene.
skills.contentPlaceholder: What this skill is and how your twin should use it…

mode.label: Choose how to create
mode.hint: All three lead to the same twin — start with whatever feels easiest.

questionnaire.title: Guided questionnaire
questionnaire.description: Answer a few guided prompts to shape your twin step by step.

nl.title: Natural language
nl.description: Describe the person in plain words; AI drafts an editable brain.

corpus.title: Paste a corpus
corpus.description: Paste chats or writing to distill their voice and persona.

generate.namePlaceholder: Leave blank to let AI name it
generate.questionsTitle: A few things that would sharpen it
generate.questionsHint: Fold answers into the description above and regenerate — or fine-tune below.
generate.draftHint: Review and fine-tune the brain below, then create.
generate.inputRequired: Describe the person or paste some text first.
generate.emptyDraft: Fill in the field above and generate — the draft appears here.

nl.inputPlaceholder: e.g. My friend Lin, a 35-year-old PM — rational yet funny, loves explaining hard things with analogies, hates empty talk and finger-pointing…

corpus.inputPlaceholder: Paste chat logs, posts, articles, or any writing that captures them…

tune.jsonHint: Edit JSON directly — it syncs to the form once it parses.

fields.name: Name
fields.emojiDescription: Let the twin sprinkle emoji into its messages.

skillSelect.hint: Pick from your library and the marketplace to inject into this twin.
skillSelect.empty: No skills available to attach yet.
skillSelect.uploadHint: Paste playbooks, notebooks, or any knowledge your twin can draw on. Optional.
skillSelect.mcpSectionHint: MCP servers are connected inside the sandbox; their tools can be invoked by skills during an encounter.
skillSelect.mcpNoTools: No tools discovered yet — try reconnecting.

skillImport.title: Import a skill pack (.zip)
skillImport.description: Upload a .zip that contains a SKILL.md; we parse its frontmatter (manifest) and body.
skillImport.isPublicHint: Public skills can be discovered and forked in the skill market.
skillImport.error: Import failed — make sure the archive contains a SKILL.md.

mcp.title: Add an MCP server
mcp.description: Register an MCP tool server; once connected we discover the tools it exposes.
mcp.tokenPlaceholder: Stored on the backend only; never returned
mcp.nameError: Give the MCP server a name.
mcp.targetError: Provide a server URL or a launch command.
mcp.error: Could not connect — check the config and try again.
